MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-01-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael Carrillo Hall, Esq. 512-9865 for Plaintiff moving for summary judgment
Defendant MANSON WONG in propria persona and opposing party

Argued and the court granted summary judgment -- no triable issue of fact exists concerning issue of Defendants status. That was determined in a companion proceeding. As to retaliation either under 1942.5 or as common law res judicata. No triable issue of fact exists. As to damages -- $1500 is reasonable rental value. Issue of determination of attorney fees was taken under submission. Prevailing party to prepare order. (JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2002 Off Calendar
